'''zagudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicafenine|nicafenine]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-g-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicafenine|nicafenine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zagudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zægidith|zægidith]] || [[word:zægidij|zægidij]] || [[word:zægidish|zægidish]] || [[word:zægidi|zægidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zaguguduth|zaguguduth]] || [[word:zaguguduj|zaguguduj]] || [[word:zagugudush|zagugudush]] || [[word:zagugudu|zagugudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zaguduth|zaguduth]] || [[word:zaguduj|zaguduj]] || [[word:zagudush|zagudush]] || [[word:zagudu|zagudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zagufduth|zagufduth]] || [[word:zagufduj|zagufduj]] || [[word:zagufdush|zagufdush]] || [[word:zagufduf|zagufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zaguduthu|zaguduthu]] || [[word:zaguduju|zaguduju]] || [[word:zagudushu|zagudushu]] || [[word:zaguduku|zaguduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zaguduth|zaguduth]] || [[word:zaguduj|zaguduj]] || [[word:zagudush|zagudush]] || [[word:zagudu|zagudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zaguduthul|zaguduthul]] || [[word:zagudujul|zagudujul]] || [[word:zagudushul|zagudushul]] || [[word:zagudukul|zagudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zaguduthuthu|zaguduthuthu]] || [[word:zagudujuju|zagudujuju]] || [[word:zagudushushu|zagudushushu]] || [[word:zaguduku|zaguduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zaguduthun|zaguduthun]] || [[word:zagudujun|zagudujun]] || [[word:zagudushun|zagudushun]] || [[word:zagudukun|zagudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zaguduthuoro|zaguduthuoro]] || [[word:zagudujuoro|zagudujuoro]] || [[word:zagudushuoro|zagudushuoro]] || [[word:zagudukuoro|zagudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
